verdict.main_hotspot: GEMM/Tensile kernels now dominate post-R3.1 prefill.
verdict.r32_gdn_roi: downgrade: GDN core is 9.30% of kernel time, or 13.28% including helpers, below the task-card 10% core threshold edge and far below the pre-R3.1 30% assumption.
verdict.next_priority: Prefer R3.0/R2.4 GEMM library/autotune before spending a full implementation cycle on GDN, unless a broader 16-32K profile contradicts this single-request trace.
